news.t: Invesco S&P 500 Pure Growth ETF Among Today's US Growth Smart Beta ETFs
Analysts Anticipate The Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF To Hit $212
Analysts Predict 14% Upside For The Holdings Of The Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF
Implied Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF Analyst Target Price: $180
Analysts Predict 10% Upside For The Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF
Analysts Anticipate The Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF Will Reach $169

holdings.infoBox: VONG is an equity ETF with a total of 395 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.06%, Apple at 11.94%, Microsoft at 8.95%, Broadcom at 5.77%, and Amazon.com at 5.05%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF (VONG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap stocks selected from the Russell 1000 Index for growth characteristics. VONG was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.
